title: Getting teased
desc: Give as good as you get
setting: You're hanging out with friends and Roberto starts ribbing you, Nica-style. Teasing means they like you — so tease back.

steps.speaker: Roberto
steps.es: Maje, con ese acento todavía parecés gringo perdido.
steps.en: Dude, with that accent you still sound like a lost gringo.

options.es: Y vos con esa panza ya sos dos majes.
options.en: And you with that belly are already two dudes.
options.feedback: Perfect — you teased right back. That's exactly how you earn respect here.
Taking it personally kills the fun. Among friends, teasing is affection — roll with it.

options.en: Haha, at least I learned, right?
options.feedback: Good-natured and fine — though firing back a joke would land even better.

steps.speaker: Roberto
steps.en: Whoa! The foreigner came back with a comeback.

options.es: Aprendí del mejor... digo, del más hablador.
options.en: I learned from the best... I mean, the most talkative.
options.feedback: Quick, playful, with a little twist at the end — that's real Nica banter. Excellent.

options.en: Of course, I can hold my own now.
options.feedback: Confident and casual. Shows you're comfortable in the back-and-forth.
It's not a fight! Misreading friendly teasing as conflict puts a wall up. Keep it light.

steps.speaker: Roberto
steps.es: Jajaja, ya te volviste bien vacilón.
steps.en: Hahaha, you've become a real jokester.

options.es: Ideay, algo se me pega de andar con vos.
options.en: Well, something rubs off hanging out with you.
options.feedback: 'Ideay' plus a playful jab — flawless. You're thinking in Nica now.
Sweet but a little earnest for the moment. The banter's still rolling — keep playing.

options.en: It's 'cause I have a good teacher.
options.feedback: Warm and clever — a compliment wrapped in a joke. Nicely done.

steps.speaker: Roberto
steps.es: Ya sos de los nuestros, maje.
steps.en: You're one of us now, dude.

options.feedback: Confident and warm — 'ni se pregunta' is a great idiomatic flourish. You belong.

options.es: Me alegra escuchar eso, de verdad.
options.en: I'm glad to hear that, truly.
options.feedback: Sincere — a nice moment of real warmth after all the joking. Balanced perfectly.
A bit flat for such a warm thing to say. Let the moment land with more feeling.
